mapper.select: SELECT id, project_id, name, display_name, description, current_version_id, status, source, relative_path, checksum, validation_status, validation_message, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM runtime_skill WHERE project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, project_id, name, display_name, description, current_version_id, status, source, relative_path, checksum, validation_status, validation_message, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM runtime_skill WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, project_id, name, display_name, description, current_version_id, status, source, relative_path, checksum, validation_status, validation_message, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM runtime_skill WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND name = #{name}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO runtime_skill (id, project_id, name, display_name, description, current_version_id, status, source, relative_path, checksum, validation_status, validation_message, created_by, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{projectId}, #{name}, #{displayName}, #{description}, #{currentVersionId}, #{status}, #{source}, #{relativePath}, #{checksum}, #{validationStatus}, #{validationMessage}, #{createdBy}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE runtime_skill SET display_name = #{displayName}, description = #{description}, current_version_id = #{currentVersionId}, status = #{status}, relative_path = #{relativePath}, checksum = #{checksum}, validation_status = #{validationStatus}, validation_message = #{validationMessage}, updated_at = (datetime('now')) WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM runtime_skill WHERE project_id = #{projectId}
